name: Tomato Pepper Steak
recipeIngredient: 1 medium onion, cut into thin wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the beef into 3-inch by 1/4-inch strips.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet; brown the beef over medium-high heat.
3. Add broth, celery, garlic, soy sauce, ginger, salt, and pepper to the pan. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to medium; cover and simmer for 55-60 minutes or until the meat is tender.
5. Add diced tomatoes, peppers, and onion; bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat to medium; cover and simmer for 5 minutes.
7. Add mushrooms; cover and simmer for an additional 5 minutes or until vegetables reach desired tenderness.
8. Combine cornstarch and cold water in a bowl until smooth. Stir into the pan, then return to a boil.
9. Cook and stir for 2 more minutes over medium heat.
10. Serve hot over rice.
